packages.name: mingw-w64-runtime
packages.description: Ubuntu MinGW headers, CRT, import libraries, and active GCC runtime DLLs repackaged into the ooblerg sysroot.

packages.name: native-sdk
packages.description: Windows-native compiler and build tools for running builds inside the packaged sysroot without shipping a Unix shell.

packages.name: python
commands: set -eu; ver=3.12.3; cache=${ROOT}/out/source-cache/python-embed/python-${ver}-embed-amd64.zip; mkdir -p "$(dirname "$cache")"; if [ ! -s "$cache" ]; then curl -fL --retry 5 --retry-delay 2 --connect-timeout 20 --max-time 900 -o "$cache.tmp" "https://www.python.org/ftp/python/${ver}/python-${ver}-embed-amd64.zip" && mv "$cache.tmp" "$cache"; fi; rm -rf ${ROOT}/out/build/python-embed; mkdir -p ${ROOT}/out/build/python-embed ${DESTDIR}/mingw64/bin ${DESTDIR}/mingw64/share/doc/python; unzip -q "$cache" -d ${ROOT}/out/build/python-embed; cp -a ${ROOT}/out/build/python-embed/. ${DESTDIR}/mingw64/bin/; rm -f ${DESTDIR}/mingw64/bin/libffi-8.dll; cp ${DESTDIR}/mingw64/bin/python.exe ${DESTDIR}/mingw64/bin/python3.exe; cp ${DESTDIR}/mingw64/bin/LICENSE.txt ${DESTDIR}/mingw64/share/doc/python/LICENSE.txt

packages.name: busybox-w32
commands: set -eu; unset CPPFLAGS CFLAGS CXXFLAGS LDFLAGS PKG_CONFIG PKG_CONFIG_LIBDIR PKG_CONFIG_SYSROOT_DIR; tag=FRP-6075-g169694ebd; repo=${ROOT}/out/source-cache/busybox-w32/$tag; if [ ! -d "$repo/.git" ]; then rm -rf "$repo" && git clone --depth 1 --branch "$tag" https://github.com/rmyorston/busybox-w32.git "$repo"; fi; rm -rf ${ROOT}/out/build/busybox-w32; cp -a "$repo" ${ROOT}/out/build/busybox-w32; make -C ${ROOT}/out/build/busybox-w32 mingw64u_defconfig; make -C ${ROOT}/out/build/busybox-w32 -j${JOBS}; mkdir -p ${DESTDIR}/mingw64/bin ${DESTDIR}/mingw64/share/doc/busybox-w32; cp ${ROOT}/out/build/busybox-w32/busybox.exe ${DESTDIR}/mingw64/bin/busybox.exe; cp ${ROOT}/out/build/busybox-w32/busybox.exe ${DESTDIR}/mingw64/bin/sh.exe; cp ${ROOT}/out/build/busybox-w32/busybox.exe ${DESTDIR}/mingw64/bin/bash.exe; cp ${ROOT}/out/build/busybox-w32/LICENSE ${ROOT}/out/build/busybox-w32/README.md ${DESTDIR}/mingw64/share/doc/busybox-w32/

packages.name: git
packages.description: Git for Windows portable distribution staged privately under /mingw64/opt/git with a /mingw64/bin/git.exe launcher.
commands: set -eu; cache=${ROOT}/out/source-cache/git-for-windows/PortableGit-2.54.0-64-bit.7z.exe; mkdir -p "$(dirname "$cache")"; if [ ! -s "$cache" ]; then curl -fL --retry 5 --retry-delay 2 --connect-timeout 20 --max-time 900 -o "$cache.tmp" "https://github.com/git-for-windows/git/releases/download/v2.54.0.windows.1/PortableGit-2.54.0-64-bit.7z.exe" && mv "$cache.tmp" "$cache"; fi; rm -rf ${DESTDIR}/mingw64/opt/git; mkdir -p ${DESTDIR}/mingw64/opt/git ${DESTDIR}/mingw64/bin; 7z x -y -o${DESTDIR}/mingw64/opt/git "$cache" >/dev/null

packages.name: make
commands: rm -rf ${ROOT}/out/build/make-w32 && mkdir -p ${ROOT}/out/build/make-w32/src && cp src/config.h.W32 ${ROOT}/out/build/make-w32/src/config.h && make -f Basic.mk MAKE_HOST=Windows32 TOOLCHAIN=gcc TARGET_TYPE=release OUTDIR=${ROOT}/out/build/make-w32/ CC=x86_64-w64-mingw32-gcc LD=x86_64-w64-mingw32-gcc CPPFLAGS='-DWINDOWS32 -DWIN32' w32_SOURCES='src/w32/pathstuff.c src/w32/w32os.c src/w32/compat/posixfcn.c src/w32/subproc/misc.c src/w32/subproc/sub_proc.c src/w32/subproc/w32err.c' 'MKDIR.cmd=mkdir -p $1' 'RM.cmd=rm -f $1' 'CP.cmd=cp $1 $2' -j${JOBS}

packages.name: gcc
commands: src=$PWD; build=${ROOT}/out/build/gcc; upstream=${ROOT}/out/build/gcc-src; rm -rf "$build" "$upstream"; mkdir -p "$build" "$upstream"; tar -C "$upstream" --strip-components=1 -xf "$src/gcc-13.3.0.tar.xz"; cd "$build" && "$upstream/configure" --build=${BUILD_TRIPLET} --host=x86_64-w64-mingw32 --target=x86_64-w64-mingw32 --prefix=/mingw64 --with-local-prefix=/mingw64 --disable-bootstrap --disable-nls --disable-multilib --disable-win32-registry --enable-languages=c,c++ --enable-shared --enable-threads=win32 --enable-libstdcxx --with-system-zlib --with-gmp=${ROOT}/out/sysroot/mingw64 --with-mpfr=${ROOT}/out/sysroot/mingw64 --with-mpc=${ROOT}/out/sysroot/mingw64 --with-isl=${ROOT}/out/sysroot/mingw64 --with-zstd=${ROOT}/out/sysroot/mingw64

packages.name: granite-7
packages.description: Granite 7 GTK4 widget and application framework library for elementary-style apps, GLib, GObject, Vala, SQGI, and introspection.

packages.name: libadwaita
packages.description: Libadwaita GTK4 adaptive widget and application library for modern GNOME-style apps, Adw widgets, AboutDialog, GLib, GObject, Vala, SQGI, and introspection.

packages.name: directxmath
commands: cache=${ROOT}/out/source-cache/directxmath/93e6399d6d15e1e57f80b5cea04d5a8eb892d693; mkdir -p "$cache"; archive="$cache/directxmath-93e6399d6d15e1e57f80b5cea04d5a8eb892d693.tar.gz"; if [ ! -f "$archive" ]; then curl -fL --retry 5 --retry-delay 2 --connect-timeout 20 --max-time 900 -o "$archive.tmp" https://github.com/microsoft/DirectXMath/archive/93e6399d6d15e1e57f80b5cea04d5a8eb892d693.tar.gz && mv "$archive.tmp" "$archive"; fi; printf '%s  %s\n' 5df86719dff4f5c10418de4ed3b2e8a77e41ccf8aeab3f74d2810a45e0935df7 "$archive" | sha256sum -c -

mkdir -p ${DESTDIR}/mingw64/lib/pkgconfig; printf '%s\n' 'prefix=/mingw64' 'includedir=${prefix}/include' '' 'Name: DirectXMath' 'Description: DirectXMath header-only SIMD math library' 'Version: jun2026' 'Cflags: -I${includedir}' > ${DESTDIR}/mingw64/lib/pkgconfig/directxmath.pc; cp ${DESTDIR}/mingw64/lib/pkgconfig/directxmath.pc ${DESTDIR}/mingw64/lib/pkgconfig/DirectXMath.pc

packages.name: icu
commands: cd ../build-native && env -u CHOST -u PKG_CONFIG_LIBDIR -u PKG_CONFIG_SYSROOT_DIR CC=gcc CXX=g++ AR=ar RANLIB=ranlib CPPFLAGS= CFLAGS= CXXFLAGS= LDFLAGS= ../source/configure --prefix=$(pwd)/install --disable-samples --disable-tests --disable-extras

packages.name: libgirepository-1.0
pre_configure: perl -0pi -e "s/cc\\.check_header\\('Python\\.h', dependencies: \\[python\\.dependency\\(\\)\\], required: true\\)/# skipped for libgirepository-only cross build/; s/subdir\\('giscanner'\\)/# subdir('giscanner')/; s/subdir\\('tools'\\)/# subdir('tools')/; s/subdir\\('tests'\\)/# subdir('tests')/; s/subdir\\('docs'\\)/# subdir('docs')/; s/subdir\\('gir'\\)/# subdir('gir')/" meson.build

packages.name: glib-introspection
pre_configure:
perl -0pi -e "s/if enable_gir
  # Replace the default g-ir-compiler target with the version we
  # just built\.
  meson\.override_find_program\('g-ir-compiler', gicompilerepository\)
endif/if enable_gir and not meson.is_cross_build()
  # Replace the default g-ir-compiler target with the version we
  # just built.
  meson.override_find_program('g-ir-compiler', gicompilerepository)
endif/s" girepository/compiler/meson.build

packages.name: sqgi
commands: set -eu; commit=27b9f6a299340e90ed428ba33d6a8f72d116e621; repo=${ROOT}/out/source-cache/sqgi/repo; if [ ! -d "$repo/.git" ]; then rm -rf "$repo" && git clone https://github.com/supercamel/sqgi.git "$repo"; else git -C "$repo" fetch --tags origin; fi; git -C "$repo" checkout -f "$commit"

packages.name: gserial
packages.description: GObject serial port library with GObject Introspection bindings for GLib, GTK, SQGI, and Vala applications.

packages.name: gautogui
packages.description: GObject GUI automation and input monitoring library for mouse, keyboard, text entry, global hooks, Win32 SendInput, GLib, GTK, SQGI, and Vala applications.

packages.name: gjoystick
packages.description: GObject joystick and gamepad library for XInput, WinMM, controller buttons, axes, GLib, GTK, SQGI, Vala, and introspection applications.

packages.name: gautostart
packages.description: GObject current-user autostart library for Windows Run registry entries, XDG autostart, login startup, GLib, GTK, SQGI, Vala, and introspection applications.

packages.name: zlib
pre_configure: mkdir -p win32 && printf '%s\n' '#include <winver.h>' '1 VERSIONINFO' 'FILEVERSION 1,3,0,0' 'PRODUCTVERSION 1,3,0,0' 'FILEFLAGSMASK 0x3fL' 'FILEFLAGS 0x0L' 'FILEOS VOS_NT_WINDOWS32' 'FILETYPE VFT_DLL' 'FILESUBTYPE 0x0L' 'BEGIN' '  BLOCK "StringFileInfo"' '  BEGIN' '    BLOCK "040904b0"' '    BEGIN' '      VALUE "FileDescription", "zlib data compression library"' '      VALUE "FileVersion", "1.3"' '      VALUE "InternalName", "zlib1.dll"' '      VALUE "OriginalFilename", "zlib1.dll"' '      VALUE "ProductName", "zlib"' '      VALUE "ProductVersion", "1.3"' '    END' '  END' '  BLOCK "VarFileInfo"' '  BEGIN' '    VALUE "Translation", 0x0409, 1200' '  END' 'END' > win32/zlib1.rc

packages.name: sqlite
pre_configure: rm -f sqlite3.h sqlite3.c shell.c lemon lemon.exe lemon-for-build lemon-for-build.exe mksourceid mksourceid.exe mkkeywordhash mkkeywordhash.exe src-verify src-verify.exe

packages.name: harfbuzz
pre_configure: perl -0pi -e 's/#pragma GCC diagnostic error\s+"-Wredundant-decls"/#pragma GCC diagnostic ignored "-Wredundant-decls"/' src/hb.hh

packages.name: gettext
commands: find gettext-runtime \( -name aclocal.m4 -o -name configure -o -name Makefile.in \) -exec touch {} +
cd gettext-runtime && find . \( -name aclocal.m4 -o -name configure -o -name Makefile.in \) -exec touch {} +

packages.name: libyaml
packages.description: LibYAML C parser and emitter for YAML metadata files, AppStream metadata parsing, package catalogs, configuration, and serialization.

packages.name: libxmlb
packages.description: Binary XML library for compiling XML metadata into mmap-friendly blobs used by AppStream, software catalogs, metadata indexes, GLib, and introspection.

packages.name: appstream
packages.description: AppStream GObject metadata library for software catalogs, metainfo XML/YAML, release notes, validation data, libadwaita AboutDialog appdata, GLib, and introspection.

packages.name: openssl
commands: perl Configure mingw64 --prefix=/mingw64 --libdir=lib --openssldir=/mingw64/ssl shared zlib no-tests no-asm -Dsecure_getenv=getenv

packages.name: bzip2
commands: make -j${JOBS} CC=${TARGET}-gcc AR=${TARGET}-ar RANLIB=${TARGET}-ranlib CFLAGS='-O2 -D_FILE_OFFSET_BITS=64' libbz2.a

packages.name: openblas
commands: make -j${JOBS} CC=${TARGET}-gcc FC= NOFORTRAN=1 NO_LAPACK=1 NO_LAPACKE=1 ONLY_CBLAS=1 DYNAMIC_ARCH=0 TARGET=CORE2 USE_THREAD=0 USE_OPENMP=0 BINARY=64 HOSTCC=gcc
make PREFIX=/mingw64 DESTDIR=${DESTDIR} NOFORTRAN=1 NO_LAPACK=1 NO_LAPACKE=1 ONLY_CBLAS=1 install

packages.name: assimp
